# fptcloud_instance_group (Resource)

Provides a FPT cloud instance group that can be attached to an instance in order to provide an expanded instance group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fptcloud_instance_group" "example" {
  vpc_id    = "your_vpc_id"
  name      = "your_instance_group_name"
  policy_id = "your_policy_id"
  vm_ids    = ["instance_id_1", "instance_id_2"]
}
```

## Import

Import format: `vpc_id/instance_group_id`. Use `fptcloud_vpc` for `vpc_id` and `fptcloud_instance_group` (by name or id) for the instance group `id`, then use a separate resource and an `import` block.

**Example: import an existing instance group by name**

Look up the instance group by name with the data source, then import into a dedicated resource:

```terraform
data "fptcloud_vpc" "main" {
  name = "my-vpc"
}

# Look up instance group by name to get id for import
data "fptcloud_instance_group" "existing" {
  vpc_id = data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id
  filter {
    key    = "name"
    values = ["my-instance-group"]
  }
}

import {
  to = fptcloud_instance_group.imported
  id = "${data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id}/${element(data.fptcloud_instance_group.existing.instance_groups, 0).id}"
}

resource "fptcloud_instance_group" "imported" {
  vpc_id    = data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id
  name      = element(data.fptcloud_instance_group.existing.instance_groups, 0).name
  policy_id = element(element(data.fptcloud_instance_group.existing.instance_groups, 0).policy, 0).id
  vm_ids    = [for v in element(data.fptcloud_instance_group.existing.instance_groups, 0).vms : v.id]
}
```

Run `terraform plan` to perform the import. After a successful import, you can remove the `import` block. To use the CLI instead: `terraform import fptcloud_instance_group.imported "<vpc_id>/<instance_group_id>"`.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the instance group
- `policy_id` (String) The policy of the instance group
- `vpc_id` (String) The vpc id of the instance group

### Optional

- `vm_ids` (List of String) The list of instances in the instance group

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The id of the instance group
- `policy` (String)
- `policy_name` (String)
- `vms` (String)
